session.user: Run `prettier --check docs/learned/` and report whether all files pass. Just report pass/fail and list any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check the formatting of all files in the docs/learned/ directory.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting for docs/learned/ directory

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
Checking formatting...
session.assistant:
prettier failed: 2 files need formatting
**Files that need formatting:** - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
